entity.name: cxuan
entity.description: I am the maintainer of bestJavaer / cxuan-ai-labs, an open-source AI coding workflow and developer education lab for Chinese-speaking developers. The project focuses on practical AI-assisted development workflows, Agent experiments, curated resources, reproducible notes, and documented failure cases. Its older Java learning material is preserved as an archive, but the active project narrative is AI tooling, AI coding workflows, and open developer education.

projects.name: bestJavaer / cxuan-ai-labs
projects.description: bestJavaer / cxuan-ai-labs is an open-source AI coding workflow and developer education lab for Chinese-speaking developers. It collects AI articles, Agent experiments, curated resources, AI-assisted development workflows, reproducible notes, and documented failure cases. The project preserves older Java learning material as an archive, but its current main line is AI tooling, AI coding workflows, and open developer education.

channels.description: Please contact the maintainer by email for grant paperwork, payment details and tax documentation.

plans.name: Sustainability support for bestJavaer / cxuan-ai-labs
plans.description: One-time support to sustain bestJavaer / cxuan-ai-labs as an open-source AI coding workflow and developer education lab for Chinese-speaking developers, including open documentation, AI resource curation, reproducible AI experiments, workflow notes, evaluation notes and community maintenance.
